title: lycopodium clavatum subsp. monostachyon
intro: Lycopodium clavatum subsp. monostachyon, commonly known as club moss, is a type of lycopod, a group of ancient vascular plants that belong to the division Lycopodiophyta. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve congestion and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum subsp. monostachyon include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive disorders.
